title: LlamaCppRuntime end-to-end integration smoke test (load + generate + LoRA + KV + spec-decode)
goal: End-to-end integration test exercising the full LlamaCppRuntime surface on a representative GGUF: load, generate, mount LoRA, generate with override, switch KV quant, prefix-share commit/restore, self-spec ngram, unload. Test gated by HANDSHAKE_TEST_GGUF_PATH env var.
expected_diff_shape: New src/backend/handshake_core/tests/llama_cpp_e2e_smoke.rs with a single integration test orchestrating the full path; CI documentation note in tests/README.json (NOT .md) describing how to populate the env var.
implementation_notes: Smoke test scenario: (1) load fixture GGUF (operator-supplied via HANDSHAKE_TEST_GGUF_PATH); (2) assert capabilities { supports_lora=true, supports_kv_quantization=Q4Q8Mix, supports_speculative_draft=true, supports_activation_steering=false, supports_subquadratic=false, supports_eagle3=false }; (3) generate with seed=42 and capture output; (4) mount fixture LoRA (HANDSHAKE_TEST_LORA_PATH env, skip substep if absent), generate again with override, and optionally assert output differs only when HANDSHAKE_TEST_LORA_EXPECT_DIFFERENT is set for a curated LoRA fixture; (5) switch KV quant from default/none to q4, generate, and assert no crash; (6) prefix_commit on a tokenized prompt, generate continuation, prefix_restore, generate same continuation, assert deterministic; (7) ngram self-spec generate (mode=Ngram{lookback=4, max_draft=4}) and assert output matches non-spec generation with nonzero draft stats; (8) score a sequence and assert finite non-positive token logprobs/mean; (9) embed, or skip only when the model/context reports embedding capability unsupported; (10) unload and assert model-specific runtime surfaces fail closed after unload. The obsolete ledger-row termination phrase is treated as a contract-alignment note: the current LlamaCppRuntime is in-process and does not own a ProcessOwnershipLedger row to terminate; model process ledger primitives remain covered by model_runtime_process_ledger_tests. Smoke test asserts FR LLM inference START/END/TOKEN and speculative accept/reject events do not leak prompt or token text. README.json documents env vars, skip policy, and artifact policy.
risk_if_missed: Regression in any LlamaCppRuntime sub-feature ships undetected; no integration evidence for AC-LLAMACPP-ADAPTER.
validator_focus: All 10 steps executed when env var present; gracefully skipped when absent (test reports skip, not fail); FR event family coverage verified.

builder_handoff_correction_20260525.operator_instruction: Operator clarified that completed/pass-like states were not validator-reviewed and instructed Kernel Builder to mark everything ready for validator handoff except the blocked item.
builder_handoff_correction_20260525.current_interpretation: Kernel Builder implementation handoff readiness only; no WP/Integration Validator pass or validator-reviewed completion is claimed.

lifecycle.ready_for_validation_reason: Kernel Builder believes implementation/supporting evidence is ready for Integration Validator handoff; validator review remains pending.

implementation_record.summary: Implemented env-gated llama.cpp end-to-end smoke coverage for live GGUF load/capabilities/generate, optional LoRA, KV quantization and prefix replay, ngram speculative decoding, score, embed, Flight Recorder inference/spec events, and unload fail-closed behavior. Supporting runtime hardening added a tokenize_prompt helper for testable KV prefixes, zero/unknown n_batch handling for ngram draft limits, immediate/final speculative stat recording, and a generation-epoch guard so stale generation workers cannot overwrite last_speculative_stats.
root_cause_notes: The first live GGUF smoke run reached ngram speculative generation but reported zero draft calls because round_draft_limit collapsed to zero when the llama.cpp context reported n_batch as zero/unknown; the fix treats zero/unknown n_batch as unbounded for draft-limit purposes.

A later race risk was identified in last_speculative_stats: generation workers share the same stats sink, so an older or non-spec generation could overwrite a newer spec generation. LlamaModelHandle now owns an AtomicU64 generation epoch, increments it on each ready generation, and record_speculative_stats writes only for the active epoch.
The stream collection helpers previously stopped on the first finish token; they now drain to stream close so final stats and terminal records cannot be missed.

red_compile.note: Initial red proof failed before helper wiring: missing tokenize_prompt hook and moved event_type access.

focused_unit_regressions.command: cargo test --manifest-path src/backend/handshake_core/Cargo.toml --features llama-cpp-runtime-engine --lib speculative_stats_ignore_stale_generation_epoch -- --nocapture; cargo test --manifest-path src/backend/handshake_core/Cargo.toml --features llama-cpp-runtime-engine --lib ngram_decoder_drafts_from_repeated_suffix_fixture_tokens -- --nocapture
focused_unit_regressions.note: Stale-epoch stats guard and repeated-suffix ngram drafting fixture both passed.

live_gguf_smoke.note: 1 passed, 0 failed using HANDSHAKE_TEST_GGUF_PATH. LoRA substep skipped because HANDSHAKE_TEST_LORA_PATH was not set; embed did not emit an embedding-disabled skip line.

no_env_skip.note: No HANDSHAKE_TEST_GGUF_PATH emits structured SKIPPED output and returns success.

native_disabled_guard.note: Native feature disabled path returns expected typed disabled behavior.

model_process_ledger_regression.note: 8 passed, 0 failed. Confirms the ledger primitive works separately from in-process LlamaCppRuntime unload.

governance_checks.json_validation: MT-080.json, packet.json, and RUNTIME_STATUS.json parsed successfully via node JSON.parse after handoff updates.

build_order_sync.note: BUILD_ORDER.md refreshed after packet next_id moved to MT-090; build-order-check passed.

topology_sync.note: Generated public-surface and governance-topology sync ran; build-order-check and topology-bundle-check are green. Umbrella gov-check still fails on six broad HBR/template/manual checks outside MT-080 runtime smoke scope.

tooling_caveats.note: Filtered cargo test without --lib still linked broad integration test binaries and hit MSVC LNK1102 out-of-memory. Lib-only targeted commands above are the valid workaround.

contract_alignment_notes: No Integration Validator has reviewed MT-080; READY_FOR_VALIDATION is an implementer handoff only.

The MT's older ledger-row termination wording is not implemented as a fake assertion because the current LlamaCppRuntime is an in-process runtime with no per-load process row. The standalone model process ledger registrar has separate passing regression coverage.

No HANDSHAKE_TEST_LORA_PATH was configured, so the live smoke exercised the documented LoRA skip path. Real LoRA output-difference validation is opt-in via HANDSHAKE_TEST_LORA_EXPECT_DIFFERENT for curated fixtures.
Umbrella gov-check --sync-topology remains red on six broad HBR/template/manual checks outside MT-080; build-order-check and topology-bundle-check are green.
Cargo output still includes pre-existing crate warnings outside the MT-080 touched files.

out_of_scope_self_evaluation.why: The owned MT files were the smoke test and README registry, but the smoke exposed live runtime bugs that blocked the required end-to-end behavior. The active WP execution rule requires patching failing areas and risks even when they sit outside the microtask owned-file list.
out_of_scope_self_evaluation.risk_reduced: Prevents false-green smoke coverage by making KV prefix prompts tokenizable, ngram speculation actually draft under live GGUF context settings, and speculative stats race-resistant under overlapping generation workers.

minimum_controls: Skip path documented (test reports skip status, does not panic when env absent).
All 10 sub-steps present and assert; no commented-out steps.
FR event family coverage explicitly verified per family.

integration_validator_review.verdict_reason: End-to-end smoke covers all 10 contract steps (load + capabilities + generate + LoRA + KV-quant + prefix replay + ngram spec + score + embed + unload) with documented skip path; live runtime bugs found by the smoke (n_batch=0 ngram zero-draft, stats-overwrite race) were repaired in-flight.
